_publications._publicationTitle: Establishment of immortalized murine mesothelial cells and a novel mesothelioma cell line.

_contextSnippet: All clones irrespective of genotype maintained their typical pavement-like morphology, and moreover, immortalized cell lines of both genotypes showed an increased cell proliferation rate when compared to the initial primary mesothelial cells evidenced from real-time growth curves
details: System successfully captured real-time growth curves showing proliferation differences between cell clones and genotypes
